news.headline: Schneider wins PepsiCo Asset Sustainability Carrier of the Year for third year in a row, recognized for sustainable transportation efforts.
news.summary: In Green Bay, Wisconsin, Schneider National, Inc. (NYSE: SNDR), a leading multimodal transportation provider, has been named PepsiCo Asset Sustainability Carrier of the Year for the third year in a row. Schneider has partnered with PepsiCo for over 20 years, making strides in sustainable transportation. This recognition highlights Schneider's commitment to environmental responsibility and innovation in the industry.

news.headline: 15,000 FDUSD reward pool up for grabs in MENASA region by Binance P2P to entice users to join.
news.summary: Binance P2P has unveiled an opportunity for users in the MENASA region to win a total of 15,000 FDUSD through a reward pool. The aim is to motivate both new and current users to engage in the platform.

news.headline: Injective's (CRYPTO: INJ) price rose 3.57% in 24 hours to $23.83. Weekly increase of 11.0%, reaching an all-time high of $52.62.
news.summary: The price of Injective (CRYPTO: INJ) has risen by 3.57% in the last 24 hours to reach $23.83. Over the past week, the INJ token has seen a notable increase of more than 11.0%, climbing from $21.5 to its current value. The coin's all-time high stands at $52.62. This data indicates a positive trend in the value of INJ in the recent time frame. For detailed price movement and volatility analysis of Injective, refer to the complete article on a financial news platform.

news.headline: PayPoint plc reported a director/PDMR shareholding transaction, with specific numbers undisclosed.
Fubo's sports-first live TV now on Comcast's Xfinity Flex, Xumo Stream Box, and Xumo TV, available to millions. Blog for details.
news.summary: FuboTV Inc. (NYSE: FUBO), a prominent sports-focused live TV streaming platform, has recently made its app accessible on Comcast's entertainment platforms, specifically Xfinity Flex, Xumo Stream Box, and Xumo TV. This expansion allows millions of Xfinity Internet households with Flex or Xumo Stream Box to now access Fubo starting today. The app is additionally accessible on Xumo TVs available at retail outlets nationwide. For further information, interested parties can refer to Comcast's blog. Fubo, recognized for its global presence, has taken this step to increase its reach and make its content more widely available.

news.headline: APsystems now on CertainTeed's list for solar panel warranty, adds 25-year coverage to roofing systems.
news.summary: APsystems, based in Austin, Texas, has recently become an approved vendor on CertainTeed's warranty list. This partnership will provide enhanced warranty coverage for solar roofing systems, offering a robust 25-year warranty.

news.headline: Greenland Resources releases sustainability report on Malmbjerg, disclosing ESG matters to investors; report by COWI.
news.summary: In Toronto, Greenland Resources Inc. (Symbol: MOLY on Cboe CA and M0LY on FSE) has released its Sustainability Report. Created by COWI, an engineering and environmental firm in Denmark, the report focuses on environmental, social, and governance (ESG) topics for investors and offtakers. The Chairman, Dr. Ruben Shiffman, expressed satisfaction with the Report, which is now accessible on the Company's website.

news.headline: New Madone Gen 8 by Trek Bicycle, fastest race bike for Tour de France, combines lightness and speed. #ultimatebike
news.summary: Riders at this year's Tour de France will be cycling on the latest Madone, a groundbreaking blend of Trek's lightest and swiftest road race bikes. This high-performance bike is set to revolutionize the competition with its cutting-edge design. Launching in Waterloo, Wis., on June 27, 2024, the new Madone promises to elevate the cycling experience with unparalleled speed and agility. Stay tuned as cyclists take on the Tour de France with this innovative road bike, sure to leave spectators in awe.

news.headline: Oshkosh releases 2023 sustainability report, showcasing commitment to innovation & sustainable practices.
news.summary: Oshkosh Corporation, a key player in purpose-built vehicles and equipment, has unveiled its 11th annual sustainability report. This report underscores the company's dedication to innovation and sustainable practices in contributing towards global progress. The Oshkosh Corporation's 2023 sustainability report can be accessed online. The report showcases the advancements made by the company across various areas.

news.headline: Corvias urges military housing residents to give feedback for improvement; Army Housing Tenant Satisfaction Survey saw response rate nearly 40% higher this year.
news.summary: Corvias, based in Warwick, Rhode Island, is urging military housing residents to share feedback regularly using different platforms. To gather insights, one key approach is through the Army Housing Tenant Satisfaction Survey. After an extensive promotion blitz by Corvias and the Army, the survey saw a response rate almost 40% greater than the previous year. Residents were engaged via email, texts, phone calls, daily interactions, and community gatherings to ensure broader participation.

news.headline: Price of Blast bounces back post Ethereum Layer-2 airdrop, stabilizing after a surge and slight dip.
news.summary: After a mixed reception to its airdrop, the Ethereum layer-2 network Blast saw a resurgence late Wednesday, but has been experiencing a slowdown since. The airdrop received varied reactions from users before the network's activity picked up. As of now, Blast continues to attract attention despite the cooling trend.

news.headline: Maker's cryptocurrency (MKR) surged by 11% in 24 hours, reaching $2,637.01. Its all-time high is $6,292.31.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of Maker's (CRYPTO: MKR) has surged by 11.0% to reach $2,637.01, extending its week-long positive trend which has seen an 11.0% increase from $2,378.38 to its current value. Maker's all-time high stands at $6,292.31. The chart illustrates the price fluctuations and volatility of Maker over the past period.

news.headline: Cryptocurrency dogwifhat (CRYPTO: WIF) saw a 7.89% rise in 24 hours, now priced at $2.16, up 9.0% in a week, with an all-time high of $4.83.
news.summary: In the last day, the price of dogwifhat's cryptocurrency (CRYPTO: WIF) has surged by 7.89% to reach $2.16. This marks a part of its upward trajectory throughout the previous week with a 9.0% increase, starting at $2.03 and climbing to the present value. The all-time peak for this coin remains at $4.83. The data provides a visual representation of the price fluctuations and volatility of... (Remaining details can be accessed on Benzinga.com)

news.headline: Boeing stock remains steady in June amidst Starliner spacecraft issues, focused on bringing back two NASA astronauts from ISS.
news.summary: In June, Boeing's stock has remained resilient despite setbacks with its Starliner spacecraft. The aerospace company is currently focused on safely bringing back two NASA astronauts from the International Space Station (ISS). Despite the ongoing challenges, investors seem unperturbed by the developing space drama at Boeing. The corporation's stock performance shows stability during this period of uncertainty, indicating confidence in its ability to navigate through the issues with the spacecraft. The company's commitment to resolving the matter and its continuous efforts to support NASA in bringing back astronauts have contributed to maintaining investor optimism despite the challenges.

news.headline: Stocks of chip gear companies rose as Applied Materials and Lam Research saw increases after memory-chip maker Micron predicted a significant boost in capital spending.
news.summary: Shares of Applied Materials and Lam Research experienced a boost following a positive forecast from Micron, a memory-chip manufacturer, expecting a significant rise in capital spending. This led to an increase in the stock prices of both companies. The news article titled "Chip Gear Stocks Rise On Micron's Capex Plans" discusses this upward trend in the market, indicating a positive reaction to Micron's plans for investment.

news.headline: Staffing employment decreased by 186,000 jobs (7.7%) in Q1 2024, with 2.2 million temporary/contract workers per week.
news.summary: In the first quarter of 2024, U.S. staffing companies experienced a significant decline in employment, losing 186,000 jobs from the fourth quarter of 2023. This represents a quarter-to-quarter decrease of 7.7%. On average, these companies employed 2.2 million temporary and contract workers per week during this period. The figures were released in a report from Alexandria, Virginia on June 27, 2024.

news.headline: DFINITY Foundation launches UTOPIA, a new secure platform for enterprises, aiming to solve the $10 trillion cybercrime issue.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, DFINITY Foundation has unveiled UTOPIA, a cutting-edge compute platform technology that introduces private serverless clouds with unparalleled security and resilience features. This innovation is designed to empower enterprises and governments in developing systems that are highly secure and reliable.

news.headline: Balance Point Capital Advisors, LLC hires 2 new members for investment and portfolio management teams in Westport.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, in Westport, Connecticut, Balance Point Capital Advisors, LLC, a company that offers capital to lower middle market businesses, disclosed the recruitment of two new team members. Kelan Betancourt joined the investment team, while Chris joined the portfolio management team. This move aims to strengthen the company's operations and services.

news.headline: Crop protection chemicals market to reach $88 billion by 2031 - report by Meticulous Research®.óst importante indicar que o mercado de produtos químicos para proteção de culturas deve atingir US $ 88 bilhões até 2031, segundo um relatório exclusivo da Meticulous Research®.
news.summary: In Redding, California, as of June 27, 2024, a recent market study on the Crop Protection Chemicals sector revealed some significant data. This report covers market insights such as size, share, forecasts, and trends within the industry. The analysis categorizes chemicals into Synthetic (including Insecticides and Herbicides) and Biological types, based on factors like Formulation (Solid or Liquid) and Mode of Application (Seed...). This comprehensive research provides valuable information for industry stakeholders and those interested in understanding the market landscape.

news.headline: Big Oil spent $61M on failed referendum, withdrawn in defeat. Neighborhood activists win health & safety laws in Calif.
news.summary: A coalition of neighborhood activists and environmental justice communities celebrated a victory as Big Oil withdrew a referendum after spending $61 million in a failed attempt to deceive voters. The defeat resulted in the implementation of health and safety laws aimed at protecting Californians from toxic oil drilling. This victory marks a significant win for the coalition and the community at large in Sacramento, California.

news.headline: Washington Fine Properties is listing Ballantrae Farm, a 6+ acre estate in McLean, VA, dating back to the 1840s.
news.summary: In McLean, Virginia, Washington Fine Properties has unveiled the listing of Ballantrae Farm, an impressive estate spanning over 6 acres in the esteemed area. This historical property, known as "Little Ballantrae," has origins dating to the 1840s.

news.headline: ImageSource partners with Quinault Indian Nation to enhance member services with ILINX platform, transforming experience.
news.summary: In Olympia, Washington on June 27, 2024, ImageSource, the maker of ILINX, a highly adaptable process-enhancing platform, reveals a new partnership with the Quinault Indian Nation. This venture aims to transform the member services sector.

news.headline: Former Secretary of State John Kerry joins Washington Speakers Bureau, enriching roster of thought leaders and experts.
news.summary: Washington Speakers Bureau (WSB), known for representing top global voices, has recently welcomed former Secretary of State John Kerry to its team of experts. The announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Kerry brings a wealth of experience to WSB, further enhancing their lineup of thought leaders.

news.headline: Nium appoints Spencer Hanlon as COO, previously Global Head of Travel, in move to enhance operations efficiency.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Nium, a top player in real-time cross-border payments based in San Francisco and London, revealed the selection of Spencer Hanlon as their new Chief Operating Officer (COO). Hanlon, who formerly held the position of Global Head of Travel at Nium, played a pivotal role in various strategic initiatives.

news.headline: SafeLease launches SafeLease Reputation tool for 1,800+ self-storage facilities in Austin, Texas on June 27, 2024.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on June 27, 2024, SafeLease announced the launch of SafeLease Reputation, offering a range of tools tailored for over 1,800 self-storage facilities. This suite aims to assist these facilities in maintaining and safeguarding their online reputation. SafeLease Reputation provides valuable support in managing...

news.headline: Thomson Reuters (TSX/NYSE: TRI) to announce Q2 2024 earnings on Aug 1, 2024 at 8:30 a.m. EDT. CEO Steve Hasker to lead.
news.summary: Thomson Reuters (TSX/NYSE: TRI) has revealed that its second-quarter 2024 earnings report will be released on Thursday, August 1, 2024. The announcement was made in Toronto, with Steve Hasker, the president and chief executive officer of the company, leading the disclosure. The earnings release will be disseminated through a news release. Additionally, a conference call and webcast have been scheduled for 8:30 a.m. EDT on the same day.

news.headline: ABMS elects new Board of Directors and Executive Committee members in Chicago. Leading organization overseeing certification of US physicians. #Medicine #ABMS
news.summary: The American Board of Medical Specialties (ABMS), a prominent non-profit organization responsible for certifying physicians and medical specialists in the United States, has reported the appointment of new members to its Board of Directors during a recent announcement on June 27, 2024. The ABMS plays a crucial role in overseeing the certification process for healthcare professionals across the country.

news.headline: Mesirow partners with Capital Group to launch fiduciary services, growing in service adoption, capitalizing on tech investment.
news.summary: Mesirow has introduced a new outsourced fiduciary program in collaboration with Capital Group, known for American Funds, which is the fifth-largest recordkeeper in terms of the number of plans managed. This strategic move marks an important development for Mesirow as they witness significant growth in the adoption of their services. The company's commitment to investing in technology has been a key factor driving its growth trajectory.

news.headline: United Airlines to discuss Q2 2024 results in webcast on July 18 at 9:30am CT/10:30am ET. More details at ir.united.com.
news.summary: A conference call by United is scheduled to review the financial results for the second quarter of 2024 on July 18 at 9:30 a.m. CT/10:30 a.m. ET. The event will be available for live listen-only webcast at ir.united.com. The company will release its quarterly numbers during the call.

news.headline: Trintech named one of the best and brightest companies to work for in 2024, recognized by National Association.
news.summary: Trintech, a prominent global provider of cloud-based financial close solutions for the Office of Finance, has recently been recognized as one of the top companies to work for in the nation. The prestigious honor was bestowed by the National Association for Human Resources, solidifying Trintech's position as a desirable workplace. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to fostering a positive work environment and employee satisfaction.

news.headline: $70 billion in 6-month bills to be auctioned by US on July 1, settling on July 5.
Kansas City Fed Manufacturing reported -11, worse than expected (-) and lower than previous (-1).
Toprak Razgatlioglu wins 3 races in Misano but fined €500 for stoppie celebration. Dominates championship lead.
news.summary: In the recent World Superbike round held in Misano, ROKiT BMW's Toprak Razgatlioglu had a remarkable performance by winning all three races. This dominant display led him to take the lead in the championship. Despite his success, there was a minor hiccup as the race directors fined the Turkish rider €500 for his celebratory stoppie maneuver while crossing the finish line in the second race. Toprak took the fine in stride, mentioning that everyone enjoyed the moment, and he will cover the cost without any issue.

news.headline: Micron released 2024 sustainability report showcasing progress and vision for long-term sustainability.
news.summary: Boise, Idaho - On June 27, 2024, Micron Technology, Inc. (Nasdaq: MU), a renowned provider of memory and storage solutions worldwide, unveiled its latest 2024 sustainability report. This comprehensive document showcases Micron's progress in sustainability, emphasizing its acclaimed initiatives and reiterating the company's dedication to sustainability and state-of-the-art technology.

news.headline: Keysight Technologies chosen to test Thunderbolt™ 5 products by Allion Labs, enabling speeds up to 120 Gbps.
news.summary: In Santa Rosa, California, Keysight Technologies, Inc. (NYSE: KEYS) has been chosen by Allion Labs as its testing partner for Thunderbolt 5 product certification. Allion Labs is now an authorized certification lab for Thunderbolt 5 technologies, marking a significant advance in wired connectivity. Thunderbolt 5 offers enhanced features including faster data transfer speeds, next-gen display support, and improved power delivery. This technology boasts a bandwidth of up to 120 Gbps, showcasing its high performance capabilities.

news.headline: KERV Interactive releases KERV Glow, AI-powered ad product, converting static ads into dynamic, interactive media.
news.summary: In Austin, Texas, KERV Interactive unveiled its new display advertising innovation, KERV Glow. The AI-powered product revolutionizes static display assets into dynamic, interactive brand experiences effortlessly. This initiative aims to boost consumer engagement and interaction with brand content, ultimately improving performance throughout the marketing process.

news.headline: In 2024, 92% of marketing leaders report content budget increases, with 46% planning to spend over $500,000 according to a study.
news.summary: A prominent B2B tech communications and content agency, 10Fold, disclosed the outcomes of its 2024 B2B Marketing Report titled "The Engagement Equation: How B2B Tech Marketers Are Creating and Delivering Content That Captivates in 2024." The report stems from a survey overseen by 10Fold in collaboration with Sapio Research, involving 450 marketing decision-makers from five countries across two continents. The survey delved into the strategies employed by these professionals to plan, produce, and assess content in 2024.

news.headline: Belkin sells one million kids headphones globally, solidifying its position as a leader in kids' audio products.
news.summary: In an announcement made today, Belkin, a prominent consumer electronics brand with 40 years of experience, revealed a noteworthy achievement of reaching one million units sold worldwide of kids' headphones. The brand's success can be attributed to its wide array of styles and colors, as well as its dedication to ensuring high-quality products, establishing it as a top contender in the children's audio market. Belkin has been making substantial progress in producing superior audio devices at its El Segundo, California headquarters in recent years.

news.headline: MagicSchool AI raises $15M led by Bain Capital Ventures to support educators and students with AI. Investors include Adobe Ventures and Common Sense Media.
news.summary: In Denver, MagicSchool AI, a rapidly expanding tech platform for K-12 educators and students, revealed a $15 million Series A funding round. Bain Capital Ventures spearheaded the investment, with participation from Adobe Ventures and Common Sense Media. Noteworthy angel investors in this round include Replit founder Amjad Masad, Clever co-founders Tyler Bosmeny and Rafael Garcia, and OutSchool co-founder Amir Nathoo. This financial boost aims to enhance the application of AI in education.

news.headline: YK Communications achieves a stellar 92 Net Promoter Score with support from Calix, turning all employees into brand ambassadors.
news.summary: A leading technology company based in San Jose, California, Calix, Inc. (NYSE: CALX) revealed today that one of its customers, YK Communications, has implemented significant changes with Calix's solutions. YK Communications, a 10-year client, has transformed its market approach and support system by utilizing the Calix Broadband Platform, Calix Customer Success Services, and SmartLife™ managed services. Through leveraging comprehensive cloud data provided by Calix, the family-owned broadband service provider has converted all customer-facing staff into brand advocates. This approach has resulted in increased interaction with subscribers and the creation of opportunities for upselling.

news.headline: $73 billion in 3-month US bills to be auctioned on July 1st, settlement on July 5th.
Bloomberg reports on Communication Services Sector & Industry performance. Stay updated on key numbers.
TGH's Dr. Jessica Brumley named President of American College of Nurse-Midwives. TAMPA, Fla., June 27, 2024.
news.summary: Dr. Jessica Brumley, CNM, PhD, FACNM, a certified nurse midwife at Tampa General's Women's Institute, has been appointed to lead the American College of Nurse-Midwives. This announcement was made by Tampa General Hospital on June 27, 2024. Dr. Brumley's new role signifies a significant achievement in her career within the healthcare sector.

news.headline: Kansas City Fed Composite Index at -8, exceeded -4.5 forecast and -2 previous level.
Deutsche Bank's Alan Ruskin steps down after making a significant prediction on the dollar.
QBE’s 2024 Accident & Health Report discusses neoplasm claim frequency rise impacting self-funded market. Valuable insights for employers.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, QBE North America unveiled its latest report, the 2024 Accident & Health Market Report. This report delves into existing trends in healthcare expenditures, furnishing crucial insights for employers administering self-funded health plans. QBE North America, recognized as a prominent insurance provider, aims to equip employers with the information needed to make informed decisions regarding their healthcare offerings.

news.headline: RNR Tire Express gifts a lucky father VIP NASCAR experience, closing out annual giveaway. Edward Ryan chosen.
news.summary: A prominent tire and wheel franchise retailer in Ocala, Florida, concluded its yearly charity event on June 27, 2024. RNR Tire Express, a leading national franchise in the tire and wheel sector, completed its Father's Day giveaway. Edward Ryan was named as the recipient of this initiative.

news.headline: SC stops EPA's plan to restrict pollution.
Walmart offers cookout essentials for eight under $50 for July Fourth celebrations, focusing on low prices.
news.summary: BENTONVILLE, Ark.-- Walmart is celebrating summer by offering its Every Day Low Prices on summer essentials for customers to enjoy warm weather, barbecues, and outdoor gatherings with loved ones. The retail giant ensures that customers can save during the season's big celebrations like Fourth of July and for everyday moments in between. In line with this, The National Retail Federation has recognized Walmart for its commitment to providing affordable prices. This initiative allows customers to make the most of their summertime without breaking the bank.

news.headline: Germany could oppose ECB plan to lower French bond yields, sources say. Important numbers: France, Germany, ECB.
